backend.description: Scaffold and implement a backend dynamic plugin for RHDH. Use when creating a new backend API plugin, backend module, scaffolder action, catalog processor, or authentication module for Red Hat Developer Hub.

frontend.description: Scaffold and implement a frontend dynamic plugin for RHDH. Use when creating a new page, entity card, sidebar item, theme, scaffolder field extension, or TechDocs addon for Red Hat Developer Hub.

export.description: Export and package a Backstage plugin as an RHDH dynamic plugin. Use when exporting as OCI image, tgz archive, or npm package, pushing to a container registry, or bundling multiple plugins.

wiring.description: Analyze an existing Backstage frontend plugin and generate the RHDH dynamic plugin wiring configuration. Use when generating dynamic-plugins.yaml config, mount points, routes, entity tabs, or theme config.
